title: zephyra cyanocrocus
intro: Zephyra cyanocrocus, also known as the "blue crocus" or "small crocus", is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Iridaceae family. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of zephyra cyanocrocus include alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and relieving pain. Herbal preparations of zephyra cyanocrocus can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote respiratory health and well-being.
